title: aulonemia cochabambensis
intro: Aulonemia cochabambensis is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in South America, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aulonemia cochabambensis include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, to treat various health issues, including skin conditions and respiratory problems.
